calendar.matters:
Third Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY INC'S unopposed Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is granted.

Prevailing/Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Second Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Feb-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s Second Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order:

Grant. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Mar-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY INC's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Align Technology, Inc.'s unopposed motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is granted.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
